ImageSourcePanel - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels
Creates the top panel of the LeftPanel, containing image status, current image management buttons and current parameters management buttons.

Imports an image from the src/test/resources folder.

importParametersAction() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
Open a JFileChooser for selecting an analysis parameters JSON to import.
Then applies the pipeline until the selected pipeline step, and imports parameters into the UI for every step.
importParametersButton - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
 
importTable(String) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.tests.unit.TestPipeline
Imports a ResultsTable from the src/test/resources folder.

The input directory, used here for having the relative path of the inputFile.

isProcessing - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
State flag, it's false when no img is selected or a task is running to partially disable the interface.
Used only by PreprocessingPanel.
